title: Extended Minecraft
description: Explore 80+ new biomes, battle 89+ new mobs and bosses, and wield powerful new weapons in this expansive, atmospheric overhaul of Minecraft.
body:
Explore a Whole New World with Extended Minecraft!
Dive into an enhanced Minecraft experience like never before with Extended Minecraft. Featuring over 80+ new biomes, immerse yourself in diverse landscapes, from lush forests to scorching deserts and everything in between. Each biome comes alive with new ambient sounds and realistic sound physics, giving you an atmospheric adventure at every turn.

But that’s not all! Prepare for battle with 89+ new mobs, including fierce new bosses that will test your survival skills. Equip yourself with new weapons to fend off enemies and emerge victorious.

Whether you're exploring the vast new worlds, crafting your ultimate arsenal, or conquering epic bosses, Extended Minecraft offers endless hours of adventure and excitement.
